info.title: NetRisk Backend API
info.description: Static OpenAPI reference for the stable NetRisk JSON endpoints. Snapshot-driven and stream-based routes are documented in docs/api.md.

Set-Cookie.description: Session cookie for subsequent authenticated requests.

get.summary: Read the profile for the authenticated user

put.summary: Update the authenticated user's theme preference

400.description: Request validation failed or the requested theme is unsupported.

parameters.name: gameId
parameters.description: Optional game context override used to populate activeGameId in the response.

200.description: Game summaries currently known to the server.

201.description: Game created and initial snapshot returned.

post.summary: Open an existing game and return a fresh snapshot

get.description: Returns the setup-facing catalog resolved from the core.base baseline plus enabled runtime modules. The additive resolvedCatalog field is canonical; top-level arrays remain backward-compatible mirrors.

200.description: Catalog used to configure new games.

get.summary: Legacy alias for the game options catalog
get.description: Returns the same payload as GET /api/game/options.

200.description: Catalog used to configure new games.

get.summary: Read the runtime module option snapshot
get.description: Returns the full admin-facing modular catalog resolved from the core.base baseline plus enabled runtime modules. The additive resolvedCatalog field is canonical; top-level arrays remain backward-compatible mirrors.

200.description: Runtime module selection data and enabled content restrictions.

get.description: Requires an authenticated user with module management permissions.

post.summary: Rescan the module directory and rebuild the catalog
post.description: Requires an authenticated user with module management permissions.
Requires an authenticated user with module management permissions.
Requires an authenticated user with module management permissions.

get.summary: Run the scheduled turn timeout and AI recovery jobs

AuthRequired.description: A valid session cookie is required.

resolvedCatalog.description: Canonical setup-facing modular catalog resolved from core.base plus enabled runtime modules. Top-level arrays in this response remain backward-compatible mirrors.
Canonical admin-facing modular catalog resolved from core.base plus enabled runtime modules. Top-level arrays in this response remain backward-compatible mirrors.
